name: Ro-Tel Macaroni and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 3 cups uncooked elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
1 10 oz. can RO-TEL diced tomatoes and green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Place macaroni in a 9x12 inch baking dish.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine over low heat.
4. Stir in flour; cook 1 minute, stirring constantly until mixture is smooth and bubbly.
5. Stir in milk; heat to a boil, stirring constantly.
6. Add cheese and RO-TEL. Stir until cheese is melted.
7. Pour over macaroni and stir to combine.
8. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes or until heated through.
